tables.description: This subject phenotype data table includes: demographic information (n=9 variables; gender, age, race, ethnicty, height, weight, and bmi), study eligibiliy, general medical history (n=21 variables), autoimmune, degenerative, neurological (n=10 variables), evidence of HIV (n=9 variables), blood donation (n=2 variables), information (n=43 variables), potential exposure: physical contact (n=3 variables), potential exposure: sexual activity (n=4 variables), history at time of death (n=10 variables), tissue transplant (n=2 variables), medical history source, death circumstances (n=25 variables), tissue recovery (n=13 variables), serology results (n=14 variables), organ donor or post-mortem cohort, total ischemic time for a donor, brain pH and weight, drinking status (n=6 variables), and smoking status (n=6 variables).

variables.name: DTHATPSY
variables.description: Autopsy Performed By Coroner Or ME

variables.name: DTHCAT
variables.description: Category of death based on ICD-10 coding

variables.name: DTHCLS
variables.description: Classification of death based on ICD-10 coding

variables.name: DTHCODD
variables.description: Interval Of Onset To Death For Immediate Cause

variables.name: DTHCODDU
variables.description: Interval Of Onset To Death For Immediate Cause Unit

variables.name: DTHDTRMN
variables.description: Person Who Determined Date Time Of Death

variables.name: DTHFUCODD
variables.description: Interval Of Onset To Death For First Underlying Cause

variables.name: DTHFUCODDU
variables.description: Interval Of Onset To Death For First Underlying Cause Unit

variables.name: DTHICD10
variables.description: ICD-10 Code for cause of death

variables.name: DTHLUCODD
variables.description: Interval Of Onset To Death For Last Underlying Cause

variables.name: DTHLUCODDU
variables.description: Interval Of Onset To Death For Last Underlying Cause Unit

variables.name: DTHRFGDU
variables.description: Number Of Hours In Refrigeration Unit

variables.name: DTHTYP
variables.description: Specific cause of death based on ICD-10 coding

variables.name: DTHVNT
variables.description: Donor On A Ventilator Immediately Prior To Death

variables.name: LBHIVO
variables.description: HIV I II Plus O Antibody

variables.name: MHBCTINF
variables.description: Bacterial Infections (including septicemia (bacteria in the blood), meningococcal disease, staphylococcal infection, streptococcus, sepsis)

variables.name: MHBLDOCNT
variables.description: Received Blood Transfusion In Another Country

variables.name: MHCOPD
variables.description: Chronic Respiratory Disease (Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Syndrome (COPD) OR Chronic Lower Respiratory Disease (CLRD) (chronic bronchitis, emphysema, asthma))

variables.name: MHCVD
variables.description: Cerebrovascular Disease (stroke, TIA, embolism, aneurysm, other circulatory disorder affecting the brain)

variables.name: MHDPRSSN
variables.description: Major depression (unipolar depression, major depressive disorder)

variables.name: MHFLU
variables.description: Influenza (acute viral infection including avian influenza)

variables.name: MHHIVNT
variables.description: Not Able To Be Tested For HIV

variables.name: MHHRTATT
variables.description: Heart attack, acute myocardial infarction, acute coronary syndrome

variables.name: MHHRTDIS
variables.description: Ischemic Heart Disease (coronary artery disease (CAD), coronary heart disease, ischemic cardiomyopathy)

variables.name: MHLVRDIS
variables.description: Liver Disease (liver abscess, failure, fatty liver syndrome, inherited liver insufficiency, acute/chronic hepatic insufficiency, necrobacillosis, rupture)

variables.name: MHNRTHEUR
variables.description: Resided On Northern European Military Base

variables.name: MHPNMNIA
variables.description: Pneumonia (acute respiratory infection affecting the lungs)

variables.name: MHSRGHM
variables.description: Resident Of State Run Group Home

variables.name: MHSUBABSA
variables.description: Drugs For Non Medical Use In 5y

variables.name: MHSUBABSB
variables.description: Drugs For Non Medical Use In 5y

variables.name: MHT1D
variables.description: Diabetes mellitus type 1 (IDDM, formerly juvenile diabetes)

variables.name: MHT2D
variables.description: Diabetes mellitus type II (NIDDM, adult onset diabetes)

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID, GTEx Public Donor ID

variables.name: TRCRTMPL
variables.description: Core Body Temperature - Location of measurment

variables.name: TRCRTMPU
variables.description: Core Body Temperature - Units of measurement

variables.name: TRDNISCH
variables.description: Total Ischemic time for a donor

tables.description: This sample attributes data table includes collection and technical and processing information about the samples including: sample batch information (n=6 variables; nucleic acid isolation batch, genotype and expression batch), autolysis score, sample collection and storage (n=6 variables; also RIN number and analyte type), coded site or center, tissue location and type (n=7 variables), and sample ischemic, procurement, fixative time (n=3 variables), samples included in GTEx analysis freeze, sample quality (n=5 variables), and sequencing QC metrics from RNA-SeQC or custom QC pipelines (n=100 variables).

variables.name: SAMPID
variables.description: Sample ID, GTEx Public Sample ID

variables.name: SM3PB25P
variables.description: 3' Bias, 25th Percentile: 25th percentile of 3' bias in read coverage

variables.name: SM3PB75P
variables.description: 3' Bias, 75th Percentile: 75th percentile of 3' bias in read coverage

variables.name: SM3PBGN
variables.description: Genes used in 3' bias: Number of genes used for 3' bias calculation. Only genes that are at least 600bp long (--gene-length option) and have at least 5 (--detection-threshold option) High Quality Reads mapping fully and exclusively to the gene are used

variables.name: SM3PBMD
variables.description: Median 3' bias: Median 3' bias in read coverage

variables.name: SM3PBMN
variables.description: Mean 3' bias: Average 3' bias in read coverage

variables.name: SM3PBSD
variables.description: 3' bias Std: Standard deviation of 3' bias in read coverage

variables.name: SM3PBSDM
variables.description: 3' bias MAD_Std: Standard deviation of 3' bias in read coverage, computed using median absolute deviation

variables.name: SMAFRZE
variables.description: Samples included in the GTEx Analysis Freeze

variables.name: SMALTALG
variables.description: Alternative Alignments: Reads that were mapped as secondary alignments (0x100 flag)

variables.name: SMAMBRD
variables.description: Ambiguous Reads: Mapped Reads for which the aligned segments aligned to multiple genes or a combination of exons and introns

variables.name: SMAMBRT
variables.description: Ambiguous Alignment Rate: Proportion of Ambiguous Reads among Mapped Reads

variables.name: SMAMBRTHQ
variables.description: High Quality Ambiguous Alignment Rate: Proportion of Ambiguous Reads among High Quality Reads

variables.name: SMBSMMRT
variables.description: Base Mismatch Rate: Mismatched Bases divided by Total Bases

variables.name: SMCHMRD
variables.description: Chimeric Fragments: Chimeric alignments among Mapped Reads, based on the tag specified with --chimeric-tag (default: 'ch'). If no chimeric reads are identified based on tag, Mapped Reads mapping to multiple contigs, or >2Mb apart on the same contig, will be counted as chimeric

variables.name: SMCHMRT
variables.description: Chimeric Alignment Rate: Proportion of Chimeric Reads to Mapped Reads

variables.name: SMDPMPRT
variables.description: Duplicate Rate of Mapped: Proportion of Mapped Duplicate Reads to Mapped Reads. Complementary to Unique Rate of Mapped

variables.name: SMDPRTXG
variables.description: Duplicate Rate of Mapped, excluding Globins: Proportion of Non-Globin Duplicate Reads to Non-Globin Reads

variables.name: SMDSCRT
variables.description: Discard Rate: Proportion of Mapped Reads that were filtered with optional command line flags (such as --exclude-chimeric or --tag)

variables.name: SME1ANTI
variables.description: End 1 Antisense: End 1 Mapped Reads that intersected with a anti-sense (-) strand feature

variables.name: SME1MMB
variables.description: End 1 Mismatches: Total mismatched bases ('NM' tag) of End 1 Mapped Reads

variables.name: SME1MMRT
variables.description: End 1 Mismatch Rate: End 1 Mismatches divided by End 1 Bases

variables.name: SME1MPRD
variables.description: End 1 Mapped Reads: Paired reads which were marked as first (0x40 flag) in the pair out of Mapped Reads

variables.name: SME1MPRT
variables.description: End 1 Mapping Rate: Proportion of End 1 Mapped Reads to Unique Mapping, Vendor QC Passed Reads

variables.name: SME1PCTS
variables.description: End 1 Sense Rate: Proportion of End 1 Sense reads among End 1 Sense and End 1 Antisense reads

variables.name: SME1SNSE
variables.description: End 1 Sense: End 1 Mapped Reads that intersected with a sense (+) strand feature

variables.name: SME1TTLB
variables.description: End 1 Bases: Total aligned length of End 1 Mapped Reads

variables.name: SME2ANTI
variables.description: End 2 Antisense: End 2 Mapped Reads that intersected with a anti-sense (-) strand feature

variables.name: SME2MMB
variables.description: End 2 Mismatches: Total mismatched bases ('NM' tag) of End 2 Mapped Reads

variables.name: SME2MMRT
variables.description: End 2 Mismatch Rate: End 2 Mismatches divided by End 2 Bases

variables.name: SME2MPRD
variables.description: End 2 Mapped Reads: Paired reads which were marked as second (0x80 flag) in the pair out of Mapped Reads

variables.name: SME2MPRT
variables.description: End 2 Mapping Rate: Proportion of End 2 Mapped Reads to Unique Mapping, Vendor QC Passed Reads

variables.name: SME2PCTS
variables.description: End 2 Sense Rate: Proportion of End 2 Sense reads among End 2 Sense and End 2 Antisense reads

variables.name: SME2SNSE
variables.description: End 2 Sense: End 2 Mapped Reads that intersected with a sense (+) strand feature

variables.name: SME2TTLB
variables.description: End 2 Bases: Total aligned length of End 2 Mapped Reads

variables.name: SMESTLBS
variables.description: Estimated Library Complexity: Estimated number of unique cDNA fragments in the library, based on Mapped Reads. The computation is identical to Picard's EstimateLibraryComplexity

variables.name: SMEXCVMAD
variables.description: Exon CV MAD: Standard deviation of the coefficient of variation of exon coverage, computed using median absolute deviation

variables.name: SMEXCVMD
variables.description: Median Exon CV: Median coefficient of variation of exon coverage, computed excluding the first and last 500bp of genes, using High Quality Reads mapping fully and exclusively to the gene

variables.name: SMEXNCRD
variables.description: Exonic Reads: Mapped Reads for which all aligned segments unambiguously aligned to exons of the same gene

variables.name: SMEXNCRT
variables.description: Exonic Rate: Proportion of Exonic Reads among Mapped Reads

variables.name: SMEXNCRTHQ
variables.description: High Quality Exonic Rate: Proportion of Exonic Reads among High Quality Reads

variables.name: SMEXPEFF
variables.description: Expression Profiling Efficiency: Proportion of Exonic Reads among Unique Mapping, Vendor QC Passed Reads

variables.name: SMFGCKT
variables.description: Fragment GC Content Kurtosis: Kurtosis of the fragment-wise GC content distribution

variables.name: SMFGCMN
variables.description: Fragment GC Content Mean: Mean of the fragment-wise GC content distribution

variables.name: SMFGCSD
variables.description: Fragment GC Content Std: Standard deviation of the fragment-wise GC content distribution

variables.name: SMFGCSK
variables.description: Fragment GC Content Skewness: Skewness of the fragment-wise GC content distribution

variables.name: SMGEBTCHD
variables.description: Date of genotype or expression batch

variables.name: SMGEBTCHT
variables.description: Type of genotype or expression batch

variables.name: SMGNSDTC
variables.description: Genes Detected: Number of genes with at least 5 (default) High Quality Exonic Reads (--detection-threshold option)

variables.name: SMGTC
variables.description: Name of the genotype gtc file

variables.name: SMLMAPQ
variables.description: Low Mapping Quality: Non-Failed Vendor QC reads that did not pass the mapping quality (MAPQ) threshold (--mapping-quality option)

variables.name: SMMAPRT
variables.description: Mapping Rate: Proportion of Mapped Reads to Total Reads

variables.name: SMMDCVCV
variables.description: Median of Transcript Coverage CV: Median coverage coefficient of variation, computed excluding the first and last 500bp of genes, using High Quality Reads mapping fully and exclusively to the gene

variables.name: SMMDCVSD
variables.description: Median of Transcript Coverage Std: Median coverage standard deviation, computed excluding the first and last 500bp of genes, using High Quality Reads mapping fully and exclusively to the gene

variables.name: SMMDFLGTH
variables.description: Fragment Length Median: Median insert size

variables.name: SMMDMNCV
variables.description: Median of Avg Transcript Coverage: Median mean coverage, computed excluding the first and last 500bp of genes, using High Quality Reads mapping fully and exclusively to the gene

variables.name: SMMFLGTH
variables.description: Average Fragment Length: Mean insert size

variables.name: SMMPDP
variables.description: Mapped Duplicate Reads: Mapped Reads that were marked as PCR or optical duplicates (0x400 flag)

variables.name: SMMPDPXG
variables.description: Non-Globin Duplicate Reads: Duplicate Reads excluding reads mapping to HBA1, HBA2, HBB, HBD, etc. genes

variables.name: SMMPHQRD
variables.description: High Quality Reads: Mapped Reads that passed the following criteria: aligned as proper pairs, mismatches ('NM' tag) at or below threshold (--base-mismatch option), passed mapping quality (MAPQ) threshold (--mapping-quality option)

variables.name: SMMPHQRT
variables.description: High Quality Rate: Proportion of High Quality Reads among Mapped Reads

variables.name: SMMPLQRD
variables.description: Low Quality Reads: Mapped Reads that were not High Quality Reads

variables.name: SMMPPD
variables.description: Mapped Reads: Unique Mapping, Vendor QC Passed Reads that were mapped

variables.name: SMMPPDPR
variables.description: Total Mapped Pairs: Mapped Reads pairs that were mapped as proper pairs

variables.name: SMMPPDUN
variables.description: Mapped Unique Reads: Mapped Reads that were not duplicates

variables.name: SMMPPDXG
variables.description: Non-Globin Reads: Mapped Reads excluding reads mapping to HBA1, HBA2, HBB, HBD, etc. genes

variables.name: SMMTRLTP
variables.description: Current material type of the sample as stored at the LDACC

variables.name: SMNABTCHD
variables.description: Date of nucleic acid isolation batch

variables.name: SMNABTCHT
variables.description: Type of nucleic acid isolation batch

variables.name: SMNOTES
variables.description: Internal notes about the sample generated by the LDACC

variables.name: SMNTERRD
variables.description: Intergenic Reads: Mapped Reads for which none of the aligned segments intersected any genes

variables.name: SMNTERRT
variables.description: Intergenic Rate: Proportion of Intergenic Reads among Mapped Reads

variables.name: SMNTERRTHQ
variables.description: High Quality Intergenic Rate: Proportion of Intergenic Reads among High Quality Reads

variables.name: SMNTEXC
variables.description: Reads used for Intron/Exon counts: Mapped Reads that were further filtered with optional command line flags (such as --exclude-chimeric or --tag). Equivalent to Mapped Reads if no filters are provided (default)

variables.name: SMNTRARD
variables.description: Intragenic Reads: Sum of Exonic Reads and Intronic Reads

variables.name: SMNTRART
variables.description: Intragenic Rate: Proportion of Intragenic Reads among Mapped Reads

variables.name: SMNTRARTHQ
variables.description: High Quality Intragenic Rate: Proportion of Intragenic Reads among High Quality Reads

variables.name: SMNTRNRD
variables.description: Intronic Reads: Mapped Reads for which all aligned segments unambiguously aligned to the same gene, without intersecting any of its exons

variables.name: SMNTRNRT
variables.description: Intronic Rate: Proportion of Intronic Reads among Mapped Reads

variables.name: SMNTRNRTHQ
variables.description: High Quality Intronic Rate: Proportion of Intronic Reads among High Quality Reads

variables.name: SMOMTRLTP
variables.description: Original material type of the collected sample

variables.name: SMPREGNDT
variables.description: Precursor Genes Detected: Number of small RNA precursors that were detected (>= UMIs)

variables.name: SMPRERDHQ
variables.description: High Quality precursorRNA Reads: Reads that mapped without mismatches to small RNA precursor genes

variables.name: SMPRERTHQ
variables.description: High Quality precursorRNA Rate: Proportion of reads that mapped to small RNA precursor genes without mismatches

variables.name: SMPTHNTS
variables.description: Pathology Notes, notes from PRC Report

variables.name: SMRDLNMD
variables.description: Read Length Median: Median read length after clipping adapter and UMI

variables.name: SMRDLNMN
variables.description: Read Length Mean: Mean read length after clipping adapter and UMI

variables.name: SMRDLNSD
variables.description: Read Length SD: Read length standard deviation after clipping adapter and UMI

variables.name: SMRRNARD
variables.description: RRNA Reads: Mapped Reads that at least partially intersected an annotated rRNA gene

variables.name: SMRRNART
variables.description: RRNA Rate: Proportion of rRNA Reads among Mapped Reads

variables.name: SMSFLGTH
variables.description: Fragment Length Std: Standard deviation of insert size

variables.name: SMSHRTRD
variables.description: Reads too short: Reads that were too short and not mapped

variables.name: SMSHRTRT
variables.description: Rate too short: Proportion of reads that were too short

variables.name: SMSMFLGTH
variables.description: Fragment Length MAD_Std: Standard deviation of insert size, computed using median absolute deviation

variables.name: SMSMGNDT
variables.description: SmallRNA Detected: Number of small RNAs that were detected (>= UMIs)

variables.name: SMSMRDHQ
variables.description: High Quality smallRNA Reads: Reads that mapped without mismatches to small RNA genes

variables.name: SMSMRTHQ
variables.description: High Quality smallRNA Rate: Proportion of reads mapped to small RNA genes without mismatches

variables.name: SMSPLTRT
variables.description: Avg. Splits per Read: Average number of gaps or deletions (N or D in the CIGAR string, respectively) in Mapped Reads

variables.name: SMSTYP
variables.description: Indicates whether sample is a tumor or a normal

variables.name: SMSUPALG
variables.description: Supplementary Alignments: Reads that were mapped as supplementary alignments (0x800 flag)

variables.name: SMTORMVE
variables.description: Samples flagged for removal from analysis

variables.name: SMTS
variables.description: Tissue Type, area from which the tissue sample was taken. This is a parent value to SMTSD.

variables.name: SMTSD
variables.description: Tissue Type, more specific detail of tissue type

variables.name: SMTSISCH
variables.description: Total Ischemic time for a sample

variables.name: SMTSPAX
variables.description: Time a sample spent in the PAXgene fixative

variables.name: SMTTLB
variables.description: Total Bases: Total aligned bases in Mapped Reads

variables.name: SMTTLMM
variables.description: Mismatched Bases: Total mismatched bases (from 'NM' tag) in Mapped Reads

variables.name: SMUBRID
variables.description: Uberon ID, anatomical location as described by the Uber Anatomy Ontology (UBERON)

variables.name: SMUBRTRM
variables.description: Uberon Term, anatomical location as described by the Uber Anatomy Ontology (UBERON)

variables.name: SMUMPRD
variables.description: Unique Mapping, Vendor QC Passed Reads: Reads that were neither Alternative Alignments nor Failed Vendor QC

variables.name: SMUNMPRT
variables.description: Unique Rate of Mapped: Proportion of Mapped Unique Reads to Mapped Reads

variables.name: SMUNPDRD
variables.description: Unpaired Reads: Unique Mapping, Vendor QC Passed Reads that were unpaired

variables.name: SMUVCRD
variables.description: Univec Reads: Reads mapping to UniVec

variables.name: SMUVCRT
variables.description: Univec Rate: Proportion of reads mapping to UniVec

variables.name: SMVQCFL
variables.description: Failed Vendor QC: Reads (unique) that failed platform/vendor QC (0x200 flag)

tables.description: This subject consent data table includes subject IDs, consent group information, subject aliases, and subjects' sex.

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID, GTEx Public Donor ID

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final aliquot preps that were submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and separate aliquots of the same sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPID
variables.description: Sample ID, GTEx Public Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID, GTEx Public Donor ID
